blocks.content: Reina ran at full speed toward the annex.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Quick, quick!

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: If Teraje Faction had made a move against Shirone's parents, the situation would become serious.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: On the other hand, she felt guilty. She should have been a little more careful.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: No, this was the best we could do. We strengthened all the security measures...

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: That would mean the enemy acted without regard for the consequences.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: The thought crossed her mind that perhaps all the attendants had been wiped out.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: The puzzling part was why now, of all times.
The timing of sending assassins on the first day had been perfect.
But now they were fully prepared on this side.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: In a situation where getting caught would reverse the tide, there was no reason to employ a high-risk, low-return approach.
Entering the annex, Reina turned toward Vincent's quarters.
At the same time, she bumped into an attendant from Ogent Family around the corner.

blocks.speaker: Attendant
blocks.content: Ah! Miss Reina!
Reina pushed past the attendant and ran to the room.
Move! What happened?
As she opened the door and entered, Vincent and Olena looked at her with puzzled expressions.
It didn't seem like there had been any commotion.
Vincent was in the middle of carving a piece of wood, and beside him, Olena was drinking cocoa wrapped in a blanket.

blocks.speaker: Vincent
blocks.content: Lady Reina, is something wrong? You don't look well.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Ah, well...

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: The two were safe. Then why had Amy followed Zion?

blocks.speaker: Attendant
blocks.content: Miss, what on earth is the matter? Why are you suddenly rushing here?
Reina quickly recovered her composure.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Oh, um... I just wanted to check in and make sure everything was okay, so I came by for a routine patrol.
The attendant heaved a sigh of relief.

blocks.speaker: Attendant
blocks.content: Phew, I thought something serious had happened. I was just about to go report. Everything is fine here.

blocks.speaker: Olena
blocks.content: Is something wrong? What about Shirone?
As expected, a mother's instinct about her child was sharp.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: He's still at the banquet hall. Don't worry, he's having a good time with Amy.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: At the mention of Amy, Olena seemed to relax.

blocks.speaker: Olena
blocks.content: I see. Don't worry. We're doing just fine here.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Hoho! Yes, well then, rest comfortably. I'll return soon.
Forcing a smile, Reina left the room and immediately headed in the opposite direction.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Shirone's parents were safe. But Amy would have had no way to confirm that fact.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: That meant she must have been threatened. But why Amy?
Reina suddenly stopped walking and spoke aloud.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: It was the worst-case scenario.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: The fact that no particular danger was detected in the banquet hall was the effect of the Ataraxia demonstration, meaning that most Neutral Faction had become favorable to Orkamph.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: But that had caused Zion to draw his real sword.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: No matter how much she thought about it, there was only one reason why he separated Amy—even lying about something that would be discovered right away.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: He intended to end it tonight.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: I thought things would pass smoothly, but for Zion to take action himself. That's why no intel came through.
There was no time to waste.
Since the attendant had just left Vincent's quarter, it had been over 20 minutes since she had last seen Shirone.
Reina unfolded Sound of Silence, a Schema Ear technique.
With her hearing enhanced, she began to pick up even the smallest sounds in the royal palace.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: It was too late to try following Shirone's trail now.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Wherever high decibels were heard, that would be the center of the incident.
Amy followed Zion into the underground gallery.
Whether the palace underground was originally quiet or Zion had taken care of it beforehand, not even an ant was passing by.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: On reflection, it made sense.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The banquet was going late into the night, so the attendants who weren't on duty were likely asleep.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy thought this was rather fortunate.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Zion may be royalty, but his actual fighting power was at the level of nobles his age.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Having received elite magical training from a young age, Amy felt confident she could overpower him if the opportunity arose.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Therefore, this silence worked to her advantage.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She could beat Zion without worrying about others' eyes.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: If possible, even killing him...

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It was unsettling to think about hurting someone, but with Shirone's parents being held captive, that hesitation was a luxury she couldn't afford.
With a gentlemanly smile, Zion led Amy deeper into the gallery's cavern.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy noticed that the door was double-layered and had the same thought as Shirone would have.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: If I need to break through the doors, I should save at least two magics.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But even that concern faded when she saw the peaceful atmosphere of the gallery.
It was a room filled with all sorts of items.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She didn't know what they were used for, but at least they weren't the kind of tools meant for torture or harm.
Amy examined the northern display case, which was the only part that could be used as a weapon.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Only an expert would know how well the blade was sharpened, but the sword reflected in her eyes emanated sharpness on its own.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Where are Shirone's parents?

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Parents? Well, why would I know about that?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: You deceived me?
Zion checked the time.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: The next hour was the window for assassination.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: The reason they hadn't set a definite assassination time was that they had planned the strategy with minimal personnel.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Some flexibility in the situation was inevitable, but on the other hand, it had the advantage of being able to respond flexibly to variables.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: One hour....

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Suddenly, he felt a tinge of regret.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Amy was truly a fine woman.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Wouldn't an hour with such beauty feel like a fleeting moment?

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Regardless, while he wasted time here, Zenogre and Arius would finish their task.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: All he had to do was wait and collect the Ataraxia that would roll into his lap.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: I apologize for lying. But I believe you'll understand. A little harmless deception is necessary when trying to charm a beautiful woman, don't you think?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I'll be leaving. I'll decline such invitations from now on.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Oh? I wonder if you can say that after seeing this?
When Zion opened his fist, a necklace with a yellow cross pendant dangled down.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The precision of the craftsmanship alone made it clear that it was a valuable item.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But Amy had no idea how many had fallen for such tricks, but Carmis Family was also a renowned house in Thormia Kingdom.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Even if he offered her a diamond, she was confident she wouldn't bat an eye.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What are you doing right now? Do you really think this would win my favor?

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Something like this? Why don't you look more closely?
Amy shot him a glare and inspected the pendant.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: There was no way royalty would carry anything made from alloy, so it was certainly pure gold.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: A quick look suggested that about 500 gold coins would need to be melted down to produce this size.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: A pearl was set in the center, but unusually, it had a metallic iron color.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It was far from the beautiful luster of natural pearls.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Though the form was perfect, it was clearly not something a woman would wear for aesthetics.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What is this? What's so special about it…?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy suddenly realized.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She remembered reading about it in a book.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: A pearl with a dark iron color. It was a pearl from the Heavenly Emperor Clam that lived in the Alcantra deep sea.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: According to geologists, the Alcantara Trench was the deepest part of the ocean in the world.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Because not a speck of light enters and the water pressure is enormous, fishermen can't harvest them, and only national projects involving mages can access it.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The durability of the clams that survive that pressure was said to create chemical substances harder than diamonds.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: In other words, it was one of the hardest substances in the world.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Moreover, its flawless spherical shape made it highly versatile for industrial use.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Of course, not many people would buy such things with money, but from what she read in books, Heavenly Emperor Clam pearls could replace the ball bearings of ancient weapons, so they were worth at least 200 million each.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: As such, these pearls were sometimes used as currency in large transactions between kingdoms, where transporting vast amounts of gold coins was impractical.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: So this is a Heavenly Emperor Clam pearl...

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The reason ancient weapons from prehistory still exist today is believed to be that they were made from the hardest stone in Heavens.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: However, no matter how advanced an ancient weapon was, its moving parts would eventually wear down.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: To replace those parts, they needed durability at least equal to Heavenly Emperor Clam pearls.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: One ball bearing alone was worth 200 million gold.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: One could guess how much budget kingdoms were pouring into maintaining ancient weapons' functions.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hmph. So that's what this is about.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Zion assumed her silence was due to her inner conflict.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: How could she not be? What he had offered wasn't merely a jewel but currency traded between nations.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: As expected, you have refinement. Most nobles exchange diamonds as their marriage vows, symbolizing an unbreakable love. But this, this is Heavenly Emperor Clam's pearl, far harder than any diamond.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Only direct royal lineage could use it as a betrothal gift. So, how about it? Shall we promise our future with this?
Zion prepared to put the necklace on her, flashing a greasy smile.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I'm sorry. While I'm grateful for Your Highness's favor, I cannot accept such a burdensome gift.
Zion wore a dumbfounded expression.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Then how about this? I'll let you bear my child. You could become royalty.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy was dumbfounded.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: This wet-behind-the-ears kid...

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Though nobles had political marriages, royalty took it one step further.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: They acted as if their blood was of some extraordinary value.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Well, maybe it was. Even now, women lined up wanting to bear princes.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But Amy had no desire to become royalty. So Zion's words felt nothing short of an insult.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I'll be leaving. I don't think we have anything more to discuss, Your Highness.
Amy walked to the door without waiting for a response.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: Why you……!
Zion, wounded in his pride, yanked her wrist forcefully.
Amy hurriedly shook off his hand and stepped back.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Her wrist stung from how hard he had gripped it.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What do you think you're doing?
Her voice was filled with emotion, but it was Zion who was truly furious.

blocks.speaker: Zion
blocks.content: How dare you reject me? You, just a mere noble!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Amy felt like she had heard a novel insult.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Even Thormia's royalty deferred to Carmis Family. But such thoughts rather made Amy more realistic.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: After all, standing here was not just any royalty but a son of Teraje.
